ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subway station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "top_to_bottom_status" INTEGER /* Status of the top-to-bottom traversal */,
  "bottom_to_top_status" INTEGER /* Status of the bottom-to-top traversal */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the station */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the station */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the station */,
  "total_entrances" INTEGER /* Total number of entrances to the station */,
  "total_exits" INTEGER /* Total number of exits from the station */,
  "total_elevators" INTEGER /* Total number of elevators in the station */,
  "total_escalators" INTEGER /* Total number of escalators in the station */,
  "total_toilets" INTEGER /* Total number of toilets in the station */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the station is wheelchair accessible */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_top_to_bottom_status FOREIGN KEY ("top_to_bottom_status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_bottom_to_top_status FOREIGN KEY ("bottom_to_top_status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the traversal status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected station */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the navigation issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., infrastructure, maintenance) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the issue (1 being the highest) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_issues_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where maintenance occurred */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Personnel who completed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "duration_hours" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor who approved the maintenance */,
  "inspection_required" INTEGER /* Whether an inspection is required after maintenance */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the post-maintenance inspection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers at the station */,
  "entry_point" TEXT /* Entry point of the station (e.g., main entrance, side entrance) */,
  "exit_point" TEXT /* Exit point of the station (e.g., main exit, side exit) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of travel (e.g., inbound, outbound) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data entry (e.g., clear, rainy) */,
  "special_events" TEXT /* Any special events occurring at the time (e.g., concert, parade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_flow_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the report (if applicable) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station with the issue */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the urgent issue */,
  "handled_by" TEXT /* Personnel who handled the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alert (1 being the highest) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view report, handle alert) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view reports, handle alerts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who handled the alert */,
  "handling_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was handled */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the alert handling */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the alert handling */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert handling in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the report access */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the report access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
